javascript:(function()%7Bvar%20CLIENT_ID%3D%2254e4d713f18a4e11bf270bcbd0e154ff%22%2CREDIRECT_URI%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Fbraidedcable.github.io%2Fspotify-playlist-utils%2Fcallback.html%22%2CPLAYLIST_NAME%3D%22Liked%20Songs%20with%20RNG%22%2CSCOPES%3D%22user-library-read%20playlist-read-private%20playlist-modify-public%20playlist-modify-private%22%2CTOKEN_KEY%3D%22sls_access_token%22%2CEXPIRY_KEY%3D%22sls_token_expiry%22%2CBASE_URL%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Fapi.spotify.com%2Fv1%22%2CCALLBACK_ORIGIN%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Fbraidedcable.github.io%22%3Bfunction%20createOverlay()%7Bvar%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Breturn%20e.id%3D%22sls-overlay%22%2Ce.style.cssText%3D%5B%22position%3Afixed%22%2C%22bottom%3A24px%22%2C%22right%3A24px%22%2C%22z-index%3A2147483647%22%2C%22background%3A%231DB954%22%2C%22color%3A%23fff%22%2C'font%3A600%2014px%2F1.5%20%22Circular%22%2Csystem-ui%2Csans-serif'%2C%22padding%3A14px%2020px%22%2C%22border-radius%3A8px%22%2C%22box-shadow%3A0%204px%2020px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C.35)%22%2C%22max-width%3A320px%22%2C%22word-break%3Abreak-word%22%2C%22transition%3Aopacity%20.4s%22%5D.join(%22%3B%22)%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(e)%2Ce%7Dfunction%20setStatus(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Be.textContent%3Dt%2Ce.style.background%3Dn%3F%22%23c0392b%22%3A%22%231DB954%22%7Dfunction%20dismissOverlay(e%2Ct)%7BsetTimeout(function()%7Be.style.opacity%3D%220%22%2CsetTimeout(function()%7Be.remove()%7D%2C400)%7D%2Ct%7C%7C4e3)%7Dfunction%20base64urlEncode(e)%7Bfor(var%20t%3Dnew%20Uint8Array(e)%2Cn%3D%22%22%2Cr%3D0%3Br%3Ct.length%3Br%2B%2B)n%2B%3DString.fromCharCode(t%5Br%5D)%3Breturn%20btoa(n).replace(%2F%5C%2B%2Fg%2C%22-%22).replace(%2F%5C%2F%2Fg%2C%22_%22).replace(%2F%3D%2Fg%2C%22%22)%7Dfunction%20generateCodeVerifier()%7Bvar%20e%3Dnew%20Uint8Array(32)%3Breturn%20crypto.getRandomValues(e)%2Cbase64urlEncode(e)%7Dfunction%20generateCodeChallenge(e)%7Breturn%20crypto.subtle.digest(%22SHA-256%22%2C(new%20TextEncoder).encode(e)).then(function(e)%7Breturn%20base64urlEncode(e)%7D)%7Dfunction%20getStoredToken()%7Bvar%20e%3DlocalStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY)%2Ct%3DparseInt(localStorage.getItem(EXPIRY_KEY)%7C%7C%220%22%2C10)%3Breturn%20e%26%26Date.now()%3Ct%3Fe%3Anull%7Dfunction%20authenticate()%7Breturn%20new%20Promise(function(e%2Ct)%7Bvar%20n%3DgetStoredToken()%3Bif(n)e(n)%3Belse%7Bvar%20r%3DgenerateCodeVerifier()%3BgenerateCodeChallenge(r).then(function(n)%7Bvar%20o%3DMath.random().toString(36).slice(2)%2B%22.%22%2Br%2Ci%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Faccounts.spotify.com%2Fauthorize%3Fclient_id%3D%22%2BencodeURIComponent(CLIENT_ID)%2B%22%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3D%22%2BencodeURIComponent(REDIRECT_URI)%2B%22%26scope%3D%22%2BencodeURIComponent(SCOPES)%2B%22%26state%3D%22%2BencodeURIComponent(o)%2B%22%26code_challenge%3D%22%2Bn%2B%22%26code_challenge_method%3DS256%26show_dialog%3Dtrue%22%2Cs%3Dwindow.open(i%2C%22sls_auth%22%2C%22width%3D500%2Cheight%3D700%2Cmenubar%3Dno%2Ctoolbar%3Dno%22)%3Bif(s)%7Bwindow.addEventListener(%22message%22%2Cu)%3Bvar%20a%3DsetInterval(function()%7Bs.closed%26%26(clearInterval(a)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22message%22%2Cu)%2CgetStoredToken()%7C%7Ct(new%20Error(%22Authentication%20cancelled.%22)))%7D%2C500)%7Delse%20t(new%20Error(%22Popup%20was%20blocked.%20Allow%20popups%20for%20this%20page%20and%20try%20again.%22))%3Bfunction%20u(n)%7Bif(n.origin%3D%3D%3DCALLBACK_ORIGIN)%7Bvar%20r%3Dn.data%3Bif(r%26%26r.type)if(window.removeEventListener(%22message%22%2Cu)%2CclearInterval(a)%2C%22sls_token%22%3D%3D%3Dr.type)%7Bconsole.log(%22%5BLiked%20Songs%20with%20RNG%5D%20granted%20scopes%3A%22%2Cr.scope)%2ClocalStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY%2Cr.token)%2ClocalStorage.setItem(EXPIRY_KEY%2CString(Date.now()%2B1e3*r.expiresIn))%3Btry%7Bs.close()%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7De(r.token)%7Delse%22sls_error%22%3D%3D%3Dr.type%26%26t(new%20Error(r.error))%7D%7D%7D)%7D%7D)%7Dfunction%20sleep(e)%7Breturn%20new%20Promise(function(t)%7BsetTimeout(t%2Ce)%7D)%7Dfunction%20spotifyFetch(e%2Ct%2Cn%2Cr)%7Bn%3Dn%7C%7C%7B%7D%2Cr%3Dr%7C%7C0%3Bvar%20o%3De.startsWith(%22http%22)%3Fe%3ABASE_URL%2Be%2Ci%3DObject.assign(%7BAuthorization%3A%22Bearer%20%22%2Bt%7D%2Cn.headers%7C%7C%7B%7D)%3Breturn%20fetch(o%2CObject.assign(%7B%7D%2Cn%2C%7Bheaders%3Ai%7D)).then(function(i)%7Bif(204%3D%3D%3Di.status)return%20null%3Bif(429%3D%3D%3Di.status)%7Bif(r%3E%3D5)throw%20new%20Error(%22Spotify%20rate%20limit%20hit%20%E2%80%94%20too%20many%20retries.%22)%3Bvar%20s%3DparseInt(i.headers.get(%22Retry-After%22)%7C%7C%220%22%2C10)%3Breturn%20sleep(s%3E0%3F1e3*s%3AMath.min(1e3*Math.pow(2%2Cr)%2C32e3)).then(function()%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(e%2Ct%2Cn%2Cr%2B1)%7D)%7Dreturn%20i.json().then(function(e)%7Bif(!i.ok)%7Bvar%20t%3De%26%26e.error%26%26e.error.message%7C%7Ci.statusText%3Bthrow%20new%20Error(%22Spotify%20%22%2Bi.status%2B%22%20on%20%22%2Bo%2B%22%3A%20%22%2Bt%2B%22%20%7C%20%22%2BJSON.stringify(e))%7Dreturn%20e%7D)%7D)%7Dfunction%20getMe(e)%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(%22%2Fme%22%2Ce)%7Dfunction%20getAllLikedSongs(e%2Ct)%7Bvar%20n%3D%5B%5D%3Breturn%20function%20r(o)%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(o%2Ce).then(function(e)%7Bif(e.items.forEach(function(e)%7Be.track%26%26e.track.uri%26%26!e.track.uri.startsWith(%22spotify%3Alocal%3A%22)%26%26n.push(e.track.uri)%7D)%2Ct(n.length%2Ce.total)%2Ce.next)return%20r(e.next)%7D)%7D(BASE_URL%2B%22%2Fme%2Ftracks%3Flimit%3D50%22).then(function()%7Breturn%20n%7D)%7Dfunction%20findPlaylist(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Breturn%20function%20r(o)%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(o%2Cn).then(function(n)%7Bvar%20o%3Dnull%3Breturn%20n.items.some(function(n)%7Bif(n.name%3D%3D%3De%26%26n.owner.id%3D%3D%3Dt)return%20o%3Dn.id%2C!0%7D)%2Co%7C%7C(n.next%3Fr(n.next)%3Anull)%7D)%7D(BASE_URL%2B%22%2Fme%2Fplaylists%3Flimit%3D50%22)%7Dfunction%20createPlaylist(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(%22%2Fme%2Fplaylists%22%2Cn%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3A%7B%22Content-Type%22%3A%22application%2Fjson%22%7D%2Cbody%3AJSON.stringify(%7Bname%3At%2Cpublic%3A!0%2Cdescription%3A%22Liked%20Songs%20%E2%80%94%20randomized%20by%20bookmarklet%22%7D)%7D).then(function(e)%7Breturn%20e.id%7D)%7Dfunction%20replacePlaylistTracks(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Bvar%20r%3Dt.slice(0%2C100)%3Breturn%20spotifyFetch(%22%2Fplaylists%2F%22%2Be%2B%22%2Fitems%22%2Cn%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22PUT%22%2Cheaders%3A%7B%22Content-Type%22%3A%22application%2Fjson%22%7D%2Cbody%3AJSON.stringify(%7Buris%3Ar%7D)%7D).then(function()%7Bfor(var%20r%3D%5B%5D%2Co%3D100%3Bo%3Ct.length%3Bo%2B%3D100)r.push(t.slice(o%2Co%2B100))%3Breturn%20r.reduce(function(t%2Cr)%7Breturn%20t.then(function()%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(%22%2Fplaylists%2F%22%2Be%2B%22%2Fitems%22%2Cn%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3A%7B%22Content-Type%22%3A%22application%2Fjson%22%7D%2Cbody%3AJSON.stringify(%7Buris%3Ar%7D)%7D)%7D)%7D%2CPromise.resolve())%7D)%7Dfunction%20addTracksToPlaylist(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Bfor(var%20r%3D%5B%5D%2Co%3D0%3Bo%3Ct.length%3Bo%2B%3D100)r.push(t.slice(o%2Co%2B100))%3Breturn%20r.reduce(function(t%2Cr)%7Breturn%20t.then(function()%7Breturn%20spotifyFetch(%22%2Fplaylists%2F%22%2Be%2B%22%2Fitems%22%2Cn%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3A%7B%22Content-Type%22%3A%22application%2Fjson%22%7D%2Cbody%3AJSON.stringify(%7Buris%3Ar%7D)%7D)%7D)%7D%2CPromise.resolve())%7Dfunction%20fisherYates(e)%7Bfor(var%20t%3De.slice()%2Cn%3Dt.length-1%3Bn%3E0%3Bn--)%7Bvar%20r%3DMath.floor(Math.random()*(n%2B1))%2Co%3Dt%5Bn%5D%3Bt%5Bn%5D%3Dt%5Br%5D%2Ct%5Br%5D%3Do%7Dreturn%20t%7D!function()%7Bvar%20e%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22sls-overlay%22)%3Be%26%26e.remove()%3Bvar%20t%3DcreateOverlay()%3BsetStatus(t%2C%22Connecting%20to%20Spotify%E2%80%A6%22)%2Cauthenticate().then(function(e)%7Breturn%20setStatus(t%2C%22Fetching%20your%20profile%E2%80%A6%22)%2CgetMe(e).then(function(t)%7Breturn%7Btoken%3Ae%2CuserId%3At.id%7D%7D)%7D).then(function(e)%7Breturn%20setStatus(t%2C%22Fetching%20liked%20songs%E2%80%A6%22)%2CgetAllLikedSongs(e.token%2Cfunction(e%2Cn)%7BsetStatus(t%2C%22Fetching%20liked%20songs%E2%80%A6%20(%22%2Be%2B%22%20%2F%20%22%2B(n%7C%7C%22%3F%22)%2B%22)%22)%7D).then(function(t)%7Breturn%20Object.assign(%7B%7D%2Ce%2C%7Buris%3At%7D)%7D)%7D).then(function(e)%7BsetStatus(t%2C%22Shuffling%20%22%2Be.uris.length%2B%22%20songs%E2%80%A6%22)%3Bvar%20n%3DfisherYates(e.uris)%3Breturn%20Object.assign(%7B%7D%2Ce%2C%7Bshuffled%3An%7D)%7D).then(function(e)%7Breturn%20setStatus(t%2C%22Looking%20for%20existing%20playlist%E2%80%A6%22)%2CfindPlaylist(PLAYLIST_NAME%2Ce.userId%2Ce.token).then(function(t)%7Breturn%20Object.assign(%7B%7D%2Ce%2C%7BexistingId%3At%7D)%7D)%7D).then(function(e)%7Breturn%20e.existingId%3F(setStatus(t%2C'Overwriting%20%22'%2BPLAYLIST_NAME%2B'%22%E2%80%A6')%2CreplacePlaylistTracks(e.existingId%2Ce.shuffled%2Ce.token).then(function()%7Breturn%20e%7D))%3A(setStatus(t%2C'Creating%20%22'%2BPLAYLIST_NAME%2B'%22%E2%80%A6')%2CcreatePlaylist(e.userId%2CPLAYLIST_NAME%2Ce.token).then(function(t)%7Breturn%20addTracksToPlaylist(t%2Ce.shuffled%2Ce.token).then(function()%7Breturn%20e%7D)%7D))%7D).then(function(e)%7Bvar%20n%3De.existingId%3F%22updated%22%3A%22created%22%3BsetStatus(t%2C'%22'%2BPLAYLIST_NAME%2B'%22%20'%2Bn%2B%22%20with%20%22%2Be.shuffled.length%2B%22%20tracks!%22)%2CdismissOverlay(t%2C5e3)%7D).catch(function(e)%7BsetStatus(t%2C%22Error%3A%20%22%2Be.message%2C!0)%2CdismissOverlay(t%2C8e3)%2Cconsole.error(%22%5BLiked%20Songs%20with%20RNG%5D%22%2Ce)%7D)%7D()%3B%7D)()
